calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David P. Wasserman, Esq. appeared plaintiff Cathedral Hill Associates, L.P.
Maherah Silmi, the Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mukesh Kumar, the Chief Engineer for plaintiff, was placed under oath, but did not testify.
No apearance by defendant Debra Covino, a/k/a Deborah Covino.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 31, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease Agreement dated 09/23/94-------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit with
attached proof of service dated 12/12/08---------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cathedral Hill Associates, L.P., and against defendant Debra Covino, a/k/a Deborah Covino as follows:

Plaintiff Cathedral Hill Associates, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the rental unit located at Penhouse B, 1333 gough Street, San Francisco, CA 94109. The rental agreement is agreement is canceled, and the lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment for Restitution was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
